name: Saurav Kumar
headline: MCA student and frontend developer focused on building interactive, responsive, and modern web experiences with React.

about.intro: I am an MCA student at NIET Greater Noida and a frontend developer who enjoys creating interactive, clean, and responsive web interfaces.
about.objective: My goal is to start my career as a frontend developer where I can use React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and modern UI practices to build impactful user experiences.
about.journey: My journey began with HTML and CSS, then grew into JavaScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Java, and SQL. As I kept learning, I became especially interested in frontend development and in building websites that feel smooth, modern, and user-friendly.

education.title: Master of Computer Applications (MCA)
education.institution: Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET), Greater Noida
